notes: Quality gates: npm run typecheck (passed), npm run lint (passed; eslint, effect, permissions, state-writes, overdeck-boundaries, skills, prompts, file-size all green), npm test (762 test files, 7712 tests passed including boot-reconciliation.test.ts and config.test.ts).
